series_metadata.series_description: Request from school districts to participate in the state credit enhancement program pursuant to ORC 3317.18 and OAC 3301-8-01. Files may include the department approval or disapproval letter, Office of Budget Management (OBM) advice & consent, application, supporting documentation, correspondence and if executed, the Bond Registrar Agreement.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For the life of the bond registrar agreement, if approved. If unapproved, retain for five (5) years. ; Paper: For the life of the bond registrar agreement, if approved. If unapproved, retain for five (5) years., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
